summary: The diff only shows a modification to project_state.json, which is a planning/metadata file. It records the requirements as 'pending' action requests but contains no actual implementation of any frontend changes. None of the three requirements (moving buttons/time display into Sun Effects, removing the bottom-right panel, or preserving layout) have been implemented in any frontend source files.

missing_requirements.requirement: Move the Real, Hourly, and Year mode buttons along with their corresponding time display from the bottom-right floating panel into the Sun Effects section inside the World Controls panel, preserving all existing functionality.
missing_requirements.reason: No frontend source files were modified. The diff only updates project_state.json with a 'pending' status for this requirement. No component or layout file shows the buttons and time display being rendered inside the Sun Effects section.

missing_requirements.requirement: Remove the bottom-right floating panel from the DOM entirely after its contents have been relocated to the Sun Effects section.
missing_requirements.reason: No frontend source files were modified. The diff only updates project_state.json with a 'pending' status for this requirement. The bottom-right panel removal is not implemented in any component file.

missing_requirements.requirement: Preserve the existing UI layout and 3D globe unchanged. All other controls, panels, and the globe rendering must remain exactly as they are before this change.
missing_requirements.reason: Since no frontend files were changed, this cannot be verified as implemented. The requirement is also listed as 'pending' in project_state.json.
